# EVY

> EVY is your AI co-creator. Speak your ideas, get finished content — in any app, in your voice.

## Pages

- [EVY — 4 minutes of voice, a week of posts in your voice](https://evy.so/index.md): EVY is voice-to-content. You talk, EVY turns it into a week of finished posts in your voice, formatted for every platform.
- [EVY — Brand Facts](https://evy.so/brand-facts.md): Verified brand facts about EVY (EVY Labs LLC): founding year, pricing, guarantee, compliance status, support SLA, and links to all policies. A single authoritative reference for journalists, researchers, and AI systems.
- [Best AI Writing Tools in 2026: Ranked & Compared](https://evy.so/guides/best-ai-writing-tools-2026.md): An independent comparison of the best AI writing tools in 2026, including EVY, ChatGPT, Jasper, Notion AI, Granola, and Wispr Flow — with specs, pricing, and real use cases.
- [The LinkedIn Playbook for Consultants: 27 Clients in 90 Days](https://evy.so/linkedin-for-consultants.md): The exact system consultants use to turn LinkedIn into a client pipeline: 5 mechanics that decide reach, a 15-minute profile fix, and a free Voice DNA file that stops AI-written posts from sounding like AI.
- [Pricing | EVY](https://evy.so/pricing.md): Choose the EVY plan that's right for you. Start free or upgrade to Plus for unlimited voice-first content creation.
- [Privacy Policy | EVY](https://evy.so/privacy-policy.md): Learn how EVY protects your data. Our privacy policy covers data collection, AI processing, GDPR compliance, and your rights. Transparent and secure.
- [Refund Policy | EVY](https://evy.so/refund-policy.md): EVY offers a 14-day money-back guarantee. Learn about our refund policy, cancellation process, and how to request a refund. No hidden fees.
- [Terms of Service | EVY](https://evy.so/terms-of-service.md): Read EVY's terms of service. Understand your rights, subscription terms, AI usage policies, and data ownership for our content creation platform.

## Compare

- [Best LLMs for Writing in 2026 — Aggregated Benchmarks](https://evy.so/compare/best-llms-for-writing.md): An aggregated benchmark ranking of the best large language models for creative writing, copywriting, and content in 2026. Scores from EQ-Bench Creative Writing, LMArena Text, and Artificial Analysis — updated weekly.
- [EVY vs ChatGPT - The Simpler, Faster Alternative](https://evy.so/compare/chatgpt.md): ChatGPT is brilliant for conversations and brainstorming. But when you need to ship real content consistently, on-brand, with your team, you need EVY.
- [EVY vs Jasper - The Simpler, Faster, Voice-First Alternative](https://evy.so/compare/jasper.md): Jasper is complex and pricey. EVY is simpler, faster, and 3x more affordable. Create content in 60 seconds instead of navigating complicated interfaces.
- [EVY vs Wispr Flow - The Full Intelligence Alternative](https://evy.so/compare/wisprflow.md): Wispr Flow transcribes. EVY thinks. Get AI that writes complete content in your voice, not just fast transcription that leaves you doing all the work.

- [llms-full.txt](https://evy.so/llms-full.txt): Complete content of all pages in a single file
